auth.haveAccountSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

catalog.heroEyebrow: Automation marketplace for teams short on time
catalog.heroTitle: Don't build it yourself. Buy the outcome.
catalog.heroSub: Discover ready-made automations from specialists, pay securely, and get them straight into your system — no consultation calls, no guesswork.
catalog.trust1Body: You pay for a working result — not for hours or vague promises.
catalog.trust2Body: Every purchase runs through encrypted, PCI-compliant payment processing.
catalog.trust3Body: Every automation is built and tested by professionals who do this every day.
catalog.step1Body: Browse by category and outcome until you find the automation that fits your workflow.
catalog.step2Body: Submit a request and pay via Stripe — no calls, no long back-and-forth.
catalog.step3Body: We set everything up in your system — you can track progress anytime under "My requests".
catalog.catalogSectionSub: Ready-to-use automations from our catalog, delivered to your team.
catalog.loadError: The catalog could not be loaded right now. Please reload the page.
catalog.emptyCategory: There are no automations in this category yet.
catalog.finalCtaTitle: Ready to automate your routine work?
catalog.finalCtaBody: Browse the catalog and find an automation that pays for itself in the first week.

automationDetail.bookingLinkRequired: Please provide a booking link where customers can reach you.
automationDetail.signInToRequest: Sign in to request this automation.

checkoutResult.successBody: We'll set up your automation shortly. You can track the status under "My requests".
checkoutResult.cancelledBody: No payment was made. You can try again at any time.

supportedSoftware.title: Supported software
supportedSoftware.intro: 2Fronts connects these tools to your automations automatically — no tech, in one click. We're constantly adding more integrations.
supportedSoftware.loadError: The list could not be loaded. Please try again later.

myRequests.title: My requests
myRequests.empty: You haven't requested any automations yet.
myRequests.settingUp: Setting up your AI receptionist for {{businessName}} — usually ready within a few minutes.
myRequests.failedPrefix: We hit a snag setting this up for {{businessName}} — we're on it. Need help sooner?
myRequests.active: {{businessName}} is live — calls to {{phone}} are now answered by your AI receptionist.
myRequests.forwardingSummary: Want missed calls forwarded too? This step is optional — your new number works either way.
myRequests.forwardingStep1: Open the phone app on your existing business phone.
myRequests.forwardingStep2: Find the call forwarding setting (sometimes called "forward when unanswered" or "forward when busy").
myRequests.forwardingStep3: Enter your new number, {{phone}}, as the forwarding destination.
myRequests.forwardingStep4: Save. Now if you miss a call on your old number, your AI receptionist picks it up.

mapping.loadError: The column mapping could not be loaded.
mapping.pickerTitle: Which spreadsheet should we work with?
mapping.pickerBody: Paste the link to your Google Sheet. We only read the column headers and suggest the matching mapping — nothing is written yet.
mapping.readErrorFallback: The spreadsheet could not be read.
mapping.confirmTitle: We'll write new leads into these columns — does that work?
mapping.confirmBody: We read your spreadsheet <bold>"{{sheetTitle}}"</bold> and detected the matching columns. Please confirm once before we start.
mapping.exampleBody: A new lead "{{sample}}" lands as a new row — {{mappings}}.
mapping.reassure: We only add <bold>new rows</bold>. Your existing data is never overwritten or deleted.
mapping.saveError: The confirmation could not be saved. Please try again.

slackConnect.title: Which channel should we post leads to?
slackConnect.body: Pick the channel where your new lead notifications should appear. You can only choose channels your connected Slack workspace gives us access to.
slackConnect.emptyBody: We couldn't find any channels we can post to. Make sure the 2Fronts app is added to at least one channel in Slack, then try again.
slackConnect.successBody: New leads will now post to #{{channel}}.

errors.connection: Your Slack connection has expired. Please reconnect Slack and try again.
errors.permission: We don't have permission to read your channels. Re-add the 2Fronts app in Slack and try again.
errors.generic: Your Slack channels couldn't be loaded. Please try again.
